name: kleilson-portfolio
description: Portfólio profissional open source — Kleilson dos Santos

scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @kleilson/api dev" "API_PROXY=1 pnpm --filter @kleilson/web dev"
scripts.test:e2e: env -u VITE_API_BASE_URL pnpm --filter @kleilson/web exec vite build && env -u VITE_API_BASE_URL pnpm --filter @kleilson/web test:e2e
